steps.title: Identify the grammatical structures
steps.content: Before the blank: a complete independent clause (“The reed of a wind instrument is the mouthpiece”). The blank requires: a relative clause that modifies “mouthpiece.”

steps.title: Apply the rule for word order in relative clauses
steps.content: In a relative clause, use standard word order (subject-verb): “where sound is made,” not “where is sound made.” A declarative statement also ends with a period. Options A and D violate word order; B and D use a question mark incorrectly. That matches choice C — C is correct.
